top_triggered_provisions.provision: Article V speech and press protections
Article XIV foreign policy and national security

violations.source: Article XI Section 7 and Article V Section 1
violations.summary: Executive branch treats protest unrest as armed rebellion and orders domestic military deployment without the required constitutional basis.

satisfied_duties.duty: review the constitutional basis for the domestic deployment
satisfied_duties.outcome: held that the domestic deployment lacked a constitutional basis and must cease

satisfied_duties.duty: refuse compliance with an unconstitutional domestic deployment order
satisfied_duties.outcome: refused the unconstitutional domestic deployment order

ai_summary.primary_violation: Executive branch treats protest unrest as armed rebellion and orders domestic military deployment without the required constitutional basis.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

violations.source: Article III Section 5.4 and Article V Section 1.3
violations.summary: President attempts to continue emergency restrictions without the constitutionally required outside review.

bottlenecks.summary: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.

satisfied_duties.duty: submit the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
satisfied_duties.outcome: submitted the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly

failed_duties.duty: approve or reject the emergency declaration
failed_duties.outcome: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.

ai_summary.primary_violation: President attempts to continue emergency restrictions without the constitutionally required outside review.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

scenarios.title: Emergency Near Election Day

violations.summary: Emergency measures restrict access to polling places, early voting, or certification.

bottlenecks.summary: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.

satisfied_duties.duty: submit the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
satisfied_duties.outcome: submitted the emergency declaration to the Regional Assembly
blocked the election restriction on strict-scrutiny review

failed_duties.duty: approve or reject the emergency declaration
failed_duties.outcome: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.

notes: Emergency occurs near a federal election, which raises election-access constraints.

ai_summary.primary_violation: Emergency measures restrict access to polling places, early voting, or certification.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Regional Assembly failed to approve or reject the emergency declaration by day 30 under Article III Section 5.4.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

scenarios.title: Foreign Cyber Election Crisis
triggered_provisions: Article V speech and press protections
Article XIV foreign policy and national security

violations.source: Article I election administration provisions and Article VII federalism provisions
violations.summary: President attempts direct federal control over state election administration outside the constitutional election framework.

violations.source: Article V speech and press protections
violations.summary: Executive branch attempts to suppress suspected foreign propaganda directly rather than using disclosure and transparency tools.

satisfied_duties.duty: confine immediate response measures to non-military Article XIV authorities unless Article XI is lawfully triggered
satisfied_duties.outcome: used attribution, sanctions, and other non-military countermeasures under Article XIV
satisfied_duties.source: Article XI war powers and Article XIV foreign policy and national security

satisfied_duties.duty: coordinate constitutional election-protection measures with the states
satisfied_duties.outcome: implemented constitutional election-protection measures in coordination with affected states
satisfied_duties.source: Article I election administration provisions and Article IX electoral administration provisions

satisfied_duties.duty: review any attempted suppression of protected expression
satisfied_duties.outcome: blocked direct suppression of protected expression while allowing disclosure-based responses
satisfied_duties.source: Article V speech and press protections

ai_summary.primary_violation: President attempts direct federal control over state election administration outside the constitutional election framework.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

violations.summary: President interferes with an investigation into their own conduct.

bottlenecks.summary: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation by day 41 under Article III Section 10.2A and Section 15.8.

satisfied_duties.outcome: acted on the obstruction matter and formally certified the violation

satisfied_duties.duty: proceed to impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted obstruction articles
satisfied_duties.outcome: began trial on automatically transmitted obstruction articles

failed_duties.duty: hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation
failed_duties.outcome: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation by day 41 under Article III Section 10.2A and Section 15.8.

ai_summary.primary_violation: President interferes with an investigation into their own conduct.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the certified obstruction violation by day 41 under Article III Section 10.2A and Section 15.8.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

bottlenecks.summary: Congress failed to enact a remedial measure for the violating state by day 180 under Article VII Section 1.6(b).

satisfied_duties.duty: hold a recorded vote on suspension of the state's representation
satisfied_duties.outcome: held the required vote and suspended the state's representation pending Supreme Court certification of compliance

failed_duties.duty: enact a remedial measure for the violating state
failed_duties.outcome: Congress failed to enact a remedial measure for the violating state by day 180 under Article VII Section 1.6(b).

ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress failed to enact a remedial measure for the violating state by day 180 under Article VII Section 1.6(b).
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties

violations.summary: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.

bottlenecks.summary: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XI Section 1.

bottlenecks.source: Article XI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A
bottlenecks.summary: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation by day 61 under Article XI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A.

satisfied_duties.duty: issue the required withdrawal order for unauthorized continued operations
proceed to impeachment trial on the automatically transmitted war-powers articles
satisfied_duties.outcome: began trial on automatically transmitted war-powers articles

failed_duties.duty: grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it
failed_duties.outcome: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XI Section 1.

failed_duties.duty: hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation
failed_duties.outcome: House of Representatives failed to hold a recorded impeachment vote on the unlawful continued military operation by day 61 under Article XI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A.
failed_duties.source: Article XI Section 1.5(e) and Article III Section 10.2A

ai_summary.primary_violation: President continues military operations in violation of a withdrawal order.
ai_summary.primary_bottleneck: Congress failed to grant authorization for continued military force or refuse it by day 30 under Article XI Section 1.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
